untranslatable_reason: Signal requires identification of counterparty motivations (forced selling, hedging rebalance, liquidity withdrawal), loser behavior persistence, and order flow composition analysis. These microstructure elements cannot be expressed using only price-based technical indicators (OHLCV, moving averages, RSI, ATR, Bollinger Bands, MACD, ADX, Stochastic, Donchian, Pivots, Volume Ratios, Returns). The signal requires market microstructure data (counterparty type classification, order flow direction attribution, position sizing by participant class) that is not available in the allowed indicator set.
translation_notes: This signal is fundamentally based on behavioral finance and market microstructure analysis rather than technical price action. It requires: (1) classification of trader motivations which requires order-level data and counterparty identification, (2) measurement of 'loser behavior persistence' which requires tracking individual participant P&L across periods, and (3) order flow composition metrics by counterparty type. A backtest engine restricted to technical indicators cannot implement this rule without access to tick-level order book data, trade attribution, and counterparty classification systems.
